/usr/bin/c++  -fvisibility=hidden -O3 -DNDEBUG CMakeFiles/urdf_version_test.dir/urdf_version_test.cpp.o -o ../../bin/urdf_version_test  ../../lib/libgtest_main.a ../../lib/libgtest.a ../../lib/liburdfdom_model.a -lpthread /sy_workspace/INEXUS/controller_source/3rd_build/install/aarch64/console_bridge/lib/libconsole_bridge.a /sy_workspace/INEXUS/controller_source/3rd_build/install/aarch64/tinyxml2/lib/libtinyxml2.a
